title: Bounded Exec
description: Run one shell command with a hard timeout and process-tree cleanup.

cwd.description: Working directory. Relative paths are resolved from the workspace root.

env.description: Environment variables made available to the command.

killAfterMs.description: Milliseconds to wait after graceful termination before force-killing the process tree.

forwardAllArgs.description: Append unparsed Nx CLI arguments to the command.

args.description: Extra arguments appended to the command.
